title: SLE-FNO: Single-layer extensions for task-agnostic continual learning in Fourier neural operators
snippet: Scientific machine learning is increasingly used to build surrogate models, yet most models are trained under a restrictive assumption in which future data follow the same distribution as the training set. In practice, new experimental conditions or simulation regimes may differ significantly, requiring extrapolation and model updates without re-access to prior data. This creates a need for continual learning (CL) frameworks that can adapt to distribution shifts while preventing catastrophic for
